professionals.title: Expert Plumbing & Pipefitting Specialist
professionals.bio: Certified plumber with over 8 years of experience in residential and commercial plumbing. Specialized in leak detection, pipe repair, and bathroom installations. Quality work and customer satisfaction are my top priorities.

professionals.title: Senior AC Installation & Repair Engineer
professionals.bio: Providing expert air conditioning services for 10 years. Specializing in split and window AC installation, gas charging, filter cleanup, and compressor replacement. Quick service and transparent rates.

professionals.title: Certified Domestic & Industrial Electrician
professionals.bio: Expert electrician available for all kinds of household electrical works. Over 6 years of experience in panel wiring, lighting design, power sockets repair, and smart home setups. Insured and certified.

professionals.title: Senior High School Mathematics & Physics Tutor
professionals.bio: I have a Masters in Physics and over 7 years of teaching experience. I offer home tutoring services for high school students, specializing in CBSE and ICSE syllabus. My students show average score improvements of 25%.

professionals.title: Certified Chip-Level Device Hardware Technician
professionals.bio: Micro-soldering and chip-level repairing expert for Apple and Windows products. 5 years of hardware servicing experience covering motherboard restoration, cracked screen replacements, liquid damage repairs, and software installs.

professionals.title: Professional Home Deep Cleaning & Sanitisation Specialist
professionals.bio: Over 4 years of experience delivering pristine clean homes. We use eco-friendly chemicals and professional vacuum machines to sanitise and deep-clean rooms, bathrooms, and kitchens. Punctual, trustable, and thorough.

reviews.title: Excellent Service
reviews.text: Ramesh arrived exactly on time and resolved our kitchen pipe blockage within 20 minutes. Highly recommended!

reviews.title: Fair price, good job
reviews.text: Installed the new taps cleanly. Price is reasonable and work is high quality.

reviews.title: Extremely professional AC technician
reviews.text: Mohamed resolved a complicated gas leakage issue that two other service technicians failed to repair.

reviews.title: Prompt electrical wiring repairs
reviews.text: Prompt response and quickly fixed our home inverter backup wiring issue.

reviews.title: Superb math teacher
reviews.text: Meera has been tutoring our son for 3 months now. His grades in math have improved from C to A.

reviews.title: Quick screen replacement
reviews.text: Replaced my cracked iPhone screen in less than an hour. The display feels as good as original.
